case_title: BUZZELL ELECTRIC WORKS VS OLYMPIC LAUNDRY SERVICE & DRY CLEANING

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $901.95 FILED BY BUZZELL ELECTRIC WORKS AS TO DEFENDANT OLYMPIC LAUNDRY SERVICE & DRY CLEANING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL TO SENCAM BACH, C/O OLYMPIC LAUNDRY SERVICE AND DRY CLEANING, RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BUZZELL ELECTRIC WORKS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OLYMPIC LAUNDRY SERVICE & DRY CLEANING $901.95 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $921.95 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT OLYMPIC LAUNDRY SERVICE & DRY CLEANING
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $952.95 AS TO DEFENDANT OLYMPIC LAUNDRY SERVICE & DRY CLEANING
